expect_text: When `request_user_input` is callable, use that structured chooser. Otherwise ask one concise direct question in chat with the same applicable choices, then end the turn immediately.
Execute nothing downstream until the user makes an explicit choice.
Present them as mutually exclusive choices and label a recommendation only when that section does.
Selecting a continuation whose generated skill is marked **Explicitly invoked only** counts as that continuation's explicit invocation.
Save plan only — I'll come back later
The dispatched worker defaults to cheap tier (the mechanical-tier executor role)
Stage 4 option 1's inject/check bullets above are this contract in practice
**Base SHA** — the commit/state it started from, so the returned diff has something to diff against.
The dispatching agent never accepts `status: done` at face value
